transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need a referral to see a rheumatologist. My knees have been swelling for weeks.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm sorry to hear that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Linda Marsh, born March 4th, 1976.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Linda. I see your primary care doctor is Dr. Halston. I can send a referral request to him for a rheumatology consult right now.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: That would be great. How long will it take?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Dr. Halston's office usually approves referrals within 24 to 48 hours. Once approved, I'll text you a list of in-network rheumatologists near you.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, that works. Is there anything I need to do in the meantime?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Just keep an eye on your phone for that text, and bring your insurance card to the first appointment. I've submitted the request now.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Perfect, thank you so much for your help.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Linda. Feel better soon, and call us back if you don't hear anything within two days.
